question: What does Isaiah 44:6 declare?
answer: I am the first, and I am the last; and besides me there is no God.

question: What does Isaiah 45:22 declare?
answer: Look unto me, and be ye saved, all the ends of the earth; for I am God, and there is none else.

question: What does Isaiah 49:15 declare?
answer: Can a woman forget her sucking child? yea, these may forget, yet will not I forget thee.

question: What does Isaiah 49:16 declare?
answer: Behold, I have graven thee upon the palms of my hands.

question: What does Isaiah 53:6 declare?
answer: All we like sheep have gone astray; we have turned every one to his own way; and Jehovah hath laid on him the iniquity of us all.

question: What does Isaiah 54:17 declare?
answer: No weapon that is formed against thee shall prosper.

question: What does Isaiah 57:15 say of the high God?
answer: For thus saith the high and lofty One that inhabiteth eternity, whose name is Holy: I dwell in the high and holy place.

question: What is Isaiah 58:6 about fasting?
answer: Is not this the fast that I have chosen: to loose the bonds of wickedness, to undo the bands of the yoke?

question: What does Isaiah 59:1 declare?
answer: Behold, Jehovah's hand is not shortened, that it cannot save; neither his ear heavy, that it cannot hear.

question: What does Isaiah 60:1 declare?
answer: Arise, shine; for thy light is come, and the glory of Jehovah is risen upon thee.

question: What does Isaiah 61:1 prophesy?
answer: The Spirit of the Lord Jehovah is upon me; because Jehovah hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek.

question: What does Isaiah 64:8 declare?
answer: But now, O Jehovah, thou art our Father; we are the clay, and thou our potter; and we all are the work of thy hand.

question: What does Isaiah 66:13 promise?
answer: As one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you.

question: What is Jeremiah 10:23 about?
answer: O Jehovah, I know that the way of man is not in himself; it is not in man that walketh to direct his steps.

question: What is Jeremiah 23:5 prophecy?
answer: Behold, the days come, saith Jehovah, that I will raise unto David a righteous Branch.

question: What is Jeremiah 23:24 about God's omnipresence?
answer: Can any hide himself in secret places so that I shall not see him? saith Jehovah. Do not I fill heaven and earth?

question: What is Jeremiah 31:3 about love?
answer: Yea, I have loved thee with an everlasting love: therefore with lovingkindness have I drawn thee.

question: What is Jeremiah 32:17 about God's power?
answer: Ah Lord Jehovah! behold, thou hast made the heavens and the earth by thy great power and by thy outstretched arm; there is nothing too hard for thee.

question: What is Lamentations 3:25 about waiting?
answer: Jehovah is good unto them that wait for him, to the soul that seeketh him.

question: What is Ezekiel 18:20 about responsibility?
answer: The soul that sinneth, it shall die: the son shall not bear the iniquity of the father.

question: What is Ezekiel 22:30 about the gap?
answer: I sought for a man among them, that should build up the wall, and stand in the gap before me for the land.

question: What is Ezekiel 33:11 about repentance?
answer: As I live, saith the Lord Jehovah, I have no pleasure in the death of the wicked; but that the wicked turn from his way and live.

question: What is Ezekiel 47:1 about the river?
answer: Behold, waters issued out from under the threshold of the house eastward.

question: What did Daniel see of one like a son of man, per Daniel 7:14?
answer: There was given him dominion, and glory, and a kingdom, that all the peoples, nations, and languages should serve him.

question: What did Daniel see of seventy weeks of weeks, per Daniel 9:25?
answer: From the going forth of the commandment to restore and to build Jerusalem unto the anointed one, the prince, shall be seven weeks, and threescore and two weeks.

question: What did Daniel pray about confessing sins, per Daniel 9:5?
answer: We have sinned, and have dealt perversely, and have done wickedly, and have rebelled.

question: What did Daniel see of the angel, per Daniel 10:5-6?
answer: There was a man clothed in linen, whose loins were girded with pure gold of Uphaz; his body also was like the beryl.

question: What does Daniel 12:2 prophesy?
answer: Many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt.

question: What does Daniel 12:3 say of the wise?
answer: They that are wise shall shine as the brightness of the firmament; and they that turn many to righteousness as the stars for ever and ever.

question: What did Hosea 8:7 say of sowing and reaping?
answer: They sow the wind, and they shall reap the whirlwind.

question: What did Hosea 14:1 call?
answer: O Israel, return unto Jehovah thy God; for thou hast fallen by thine iniquity.

question: What did Joel 2:25 promise?
answer: I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten.

question: What did Joel 2:32 declare?
answer: Whosoever shall call on the name of Jehovah shall be delivered.

question: What did Amos 4:12 declare?
answer: Prepare to meet thy God, O Israel.

question: What did Amos 8:11 prophesy?
answer: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord Jehovah, that I will send a famine in the land, not a famine of bread, nor a thirst for water, but of hearing the words of Jehovah.

question: What did Obadiah 1:15 prophesy?
answer: For the day of Jehovah is near upon all the nations: as thou hast done, it shall be done unto thee.

question: What did Jonah 2:9 declare?
answer: Salvation is of Jehovah.

question: What did Micah 7:18 declare?
answer: Who is a God like unto thee, that pardoneth iniquity, and passeth over the transgression of the remnant of his heritage?

question: What did Nahum 1:3 declare?
answer: Jehovah is slow to anger, and great in power, and will by no means clear the guilty.

question: What did Habakkuk 1:13 ask?
answer: Thou that art of purer eyes than to behold evil, and that canst not look on perverseness.

question: What does Habakkuk 2:20 declare?
answer: Jehovah is in his holy temple: let all the earth keep silence before him.

question: What does Zephaniah 3:9 prophesy?
answer: For then will I turn to the peoples a pure language, that they may all call upon the name of Jehovah, to serve him with one consent.

question: What did Haggai 2:9 prophesy?
answer: The latter glory of this house shall be greater than the former, saith Jehovah of hosts; and in this place will I give peace.

question: What did Zechariah 4:6 declare?
answer: Not by might, nor by power, but by my Spirit, saith Jehovah of hosts.

question: What did Zechariah 7:9-10 declare?
answer: Execute true judgment, and show kindness and compassion every man to his brother; and oppress not the widow, nor the fatherless, the sojourner, nor the poor.

question: What did Zechariah 11:12-13 prophesy?
answer: They weighed for my hire thirty pieces of silver.

question: What did Zechariah 12:10 prophesy?
answer: They shall look unto me whom they have pierced; and they shall mourn for him.

question: What did Malachi 1:6 declare?
answer: A son honoreth his father, and a servant his master: if then I am a father, where is mine honor?

question: What did Malachi 2:16 declare?
answer: For I hate putting away, saith Jehovah, the God of Israel.

question: What is Isaiah's vision of the highway, per Isaiah 35:8?
answer: And a highway shall be there, and a way, and it shall be called The way of holiness.

question: What is Isaiah 41:13 about the right hand?
answer: For I, Jehovah thy God, will hold thy right hand, saying unto thee, Fear not; I will help thee.

question: What is Isaiah 48:17 about teaching?
answer: I am Jehovah thy God, who teacheth thee to profit, who leadeth thee by the way that thou shouldest go.

question: What is Isaiah 50:4 about the tongue?
answer: The Lord Jehovah hath given me the tongue of them that are taught, that I may know how to sustain with words him that is weary.

question: What is Isaiah 52:7 about beautiful feet?
answer: How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace.

question: What is Isaiah 53:3 about the man of sorrows?
answer: He was despised, and rejected of men; a man of sorrows, and acquainted with grief.

question: What is Isaiah 53:11 about the servant?
answer: He shall see of the travail of his soul, and shall be satisfied: by the knowledge of himself shall my righteous servant justify many.

question: What is Isaiah 64:6 about righteousness?
answer: All our righteousnesses are as a polluted garment.

question: What is Jeremiah 18:6 about the potter?
answer: O house of Israel, cannot I do with you as this potter? saith Jehovah. Behold, as the clay in the potter's hand, so are ye in my hand.

question: What did the Rechabites do, per Jeremiah 35:6?
answer: We will drink no wine; for Jonadab the son of Rechab, our father, commanded us, saying, Ye shall drink no wine, neither ye, nor your sons, for ever.

question: What was Daniel's vision in the third year of Cyrus, per Daniel 10:1?
answer: In the third year of Cyrus king of Persia a thing was revealed unto Daniel, whose name was called Belteshazzar.

question: What did the angel say to Daniel, per Daniel 10:19?
answer: O man greatly beloved, fear not: peace be unto thee, be strong, yea, be strong.

question: What did Hosea 2:19 declare?
answer: I will betroth thee unto me forever; yea, I will betroth thee unto me in righteousness.

question: What did Hosea 13:14 prophesy?
answer: I will ransom them from the power of Sheol; I will redeem them from death.

question: What did Joel 3:10 prophesy?
answer: Beat your plowshares into swords, and your pruning-hooks into spears: let the weak say, I am strong.

question: What did Amos 9:13 prophesy?
answer: Behold, the days come, saith Jehovah, that the plowman shall overtake the reaper.

question: What did Micah 4:2 prophesy?
answer: For out of Zion shall go forth the law, and the word of Jehovah from Jerusalem.

question: What did Micah 4:3 prophesy of swords?
answer: They shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruning-hooks.

question: What did Habakkuk 3:2 declare?
answer: O Jehovah, revive thy work in the midst of the years.

question: What did Zephaniah 1:14 declare?
answer: The great day of Jehovah is near, it is near and hasteth greatly.

question: What did Zechariah 3:1 see in vision?
answer: He showed me Joshua the high priest standing before the angel of Jehovah, and Satan standing at his right hand to be his adversary.

question: What did Zechariah 8:16 require?
answer: Speak ye every man the truth with his neighbor; execute the judgment of truth and peace in your gates.

question: What did Malachi 2:7 require?
answer: For the priest's lips should keep knowledge, and they should seek the law at his mouth: for he is the messenger of Jehovah of hosts.

question: What did Malachi 3:6 declare?
answer: For I, Jehovah, change not; therefore ye, O sons of Jacob, are not consumed.

question: What is Habakkuk 1:1 about the burden?
answer: The burden which Habakkuk the prophet did see.

question: What was Daniel's purpose in his prayer, per Daniel 9:3?
answer: I set my face unto the Lord God, to seek by prayer and supplications, with fasting and sackcloth and ashes.

question: What was Ezekiel's wife to him, per Ezekiel 24:16?
answer: Behold, I take away from thee the desire of thine eyes with a stroke.

question: What did Jonah pray about his life, per Jonah 4:3?
answer: Therefore now, O Jehovah, take, I beseech thee, my life from me; for it is better for me to die than to live.

question: What did the LORD prepare for Jonah, per Jonah 4:6?
answer: Jehovah God prepared a gourd, and made it to come up over Jonah, that it might be a shade over his head.

question: What did the worm do to Jonah's gourd, per Jonah 4:7?
answer: God prepared a worm when the morning rose the next day, and it smote the gourd, that it withered.

question: What did Habakkuk pray of feet like hinds, per Habakkuk 3:19?
answer: Jehovah, the Lord, is my strength; and he maketh my feet like hinds' feet, and will make me to walk upon my high places.

question: How was Isaiah's prophecy on Cyrus given, per Isaiah 44:28?
answer: That saith of Cyrus, He is my shepherd, and shall perform all my pleasure.

question: What did Isaiah 45:1 prophesy of Cyrus?
answer: Thus saith Jehovah to his anointed, to Cyrus, whose right hand I have holden, to subdue nations before him.

question: What is Isaiah 11:9 about the earth?
answer: They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain; for the earth shall be full of the knowledge of Jehovah, as the waters cover the sea.

question: What is Isaiah 53:9 about the servant's burial?
answer: And they made his grave with the wicked, and with a rich man in his death; although he had done no violence, neither was any deceit in his mouth.

question: What is Isaiah 65:25 about the wolf?
answer: The wolf and the lamb shall feed together, and the lion shall eat straw like the ox.

question: What did Jeremiah see of the figs, per Jeremiah 24:3?
answer: What seest thou, Jeremiah? And I said, Figs; the good figs, very good; and the bad, very bad, that cannot be eaten.

question: What did Jeremiah do at Hanameel's request, per Jeremiah 32:9?
answer: I bought the field that was in Anathoth of Hanameel mine uncle's son, and weighed him the money, even seventeen shekels of silver.

question: What was Ezekiel's vision of the temple's east gate, per Ezekiel 43:2?
answer: Behold, the glory of the God of Israel came from the way of the east: and his voice was like the sound of many waters.

question: What is the abominable tree of Daniel 4:14?
answer: Hew down the tree, and cut off its branches, shake off its leaves, and scatter its fruit.

question: How did Nebuchadnezzar's reason return, per Daniel 4:34?
answer: At the end of the days I, Nebuchadnezzar, lifted up mine eyes unto heaven, and mine understanding returned unto me, and I blessed the Most High.

question: What did Daniel say of the Most High, per Daniel 4:35?
answer: He doeth according to his will in the army of heaven, and among the inhabitants of the earth; and none can stay his hand.

question: What was Hosea's redemption price, per Hosea 3:2?
answer: I bought her to me for fifteen pieces of silver, and a homer of barley, and a half-homer of barley.

question: What does Joel 3:14 declare?
answer: Multitudes, multitudes in the valley of decision! for the day of Jehovah is near in the valley of decision.

question: What did Amos 5:8 say of God?
answer: Seek him that maketh the Pleiades and Orion, and turneth the shadow of death into the morning.

question: What was Obadiah's vision, per Obadiah 1:1?
answer: The vision of Obadiah. Thus saith the Lord Jehovah concerning Edom.

question: What did Jonah confess to the sailors, per Jonah 1:9?
answer: I am a Hebrew; and I fear Jehovah, the God of heaven, who hath made the sea and the dry land.

question: What was Micah 7:7 about waiting?
answer: But as for me, I will look unto Jehovah; I will wait for the God of my salvation: my God will hear me.

question: What did Nahum 1:15 prophesy?
answer: Behold, upon the mountains the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace!

question: What is the famous Habakkuk question in 1:2?
answer: O Jehovah, how long shall I cry, and thou wilt not hear?

question: What did Zephaniah 2:3 call for?
answer: Seek ye Jehovah, all ye meek of the earth, that have kept his ordinances; seek righteousness, seek meekness.

question: What did Haggai 2:8 declare?
answer: The silver is mine, and the gold is mine, saith Jehovah of hosts.

question: What did Zechariah 14:9 prophesy?
answer: Jehovah shall be King over all the earth: in that day shall Jehovah be one, and his name one.

question: What did Malachi 4:6 prophesy?
answer: He shall turn the heart of the fathers to the children, and the heart of the children to their fathers.

question: What did Isaiah 1:18 invite?
answer: Come now, and let us reason together, saith Jehovah: though your sins be as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow.

question: What is Isaiah 1:17 calling for?
answer: Learn to do well; seek justice, relieve the oppressed, judge the fatherless, plead for the widow.

question: What is Isaiah 30:15 about strength?
answer: In returning and rest shall ye be saved; in quietness and in confidence shall be your strength.

question: What is Isaiah 32:18 about peace?
answer: My people shall abide in a peaceable habitation, and in safe dwellings, and in quiet resting-places.

question: What is Isaiah 41:17 about the poor?
answer: The poor and needy seek water, and there is none, and their tongue faileth for thirst; I, Jehovah, will answer them.

question: How does Matthew's gospel begin, per Matthew 1:1?
answer: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.

question: How was Joseph told about Mary's pregnancy, per Matthew 1:20?
answer: An angel of the Lord appeared unto him in a dream, saying, Joseph, thou son of David, fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife: for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Spirit.

question: What name was given to Joseph for the child, per Matthew 1:21?
answer: Thou shalt call his name JESUS; for it is he that shall save his people from their sins.

question: What does Immanuel mean, per Matthew 1:23?
answer: They shall call his name Immanuel; which is, being interpreted, God with us.

question: Who came from the east to seek the child, per Matthew 2:1?
answer: Wise-men from the east came to Jerusalem.

question: What gifts did the wise men bring, per Matthew 2:11?
answer: Gold, and frankincense, and myrrh.

question: What did Herod do to the children of Bethlehem, per Matthew 2:16?
answer: He sent forth, and slew all the male children that were in Bethlehem, and in all the borders thereof, from two years old and under.

question: Where did Joseph flee with the child, per Matthew 2:14?
answer: He arose and took the young child and his mother by night, and departed into Egypt.

question: Who prepared the way of the Lord, per Matthew 3:3?
answer: The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make ye ready the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.

question: What did John the Baptist eat, per Matthew 3:4?
answer: His food was locusts and wild honey.

question: What did the voice from heaven say at Jesus' baptism, per Matthew 3:17?
answer: This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.

question: How long did Jesus fast in the wilderness, per Matthew 4:2?
answer: He had fasted forty days and forty nights.

question: What was Jesus' first temptation, per Matthew 4:3?
answer: If thou art the Son of God, command that these stones become bread.

question: How did Jesus answer the first temptation, per Matthew 4:4?
answer: Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.

question: Where did Satan take Jesus for the second temptation, per Matthew 4:5?
answer: Then the devil taketh him into the holy city; and he set him on the pinnacle of the temple.

question: What did Jesus say to Satan in the third temptation, per Matthew 4:10?
answer: Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.

question: What was Jesus' first recorded preaching, per Matthew 4:17?
answer: Repent ye; for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.

question: Who were the first disciples Jesus called, per Matthew 4:18-22?
answer: Simon called Peter, and Andrew his brother; and James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother.

question: How did Jesus call Peter and Andrew, per Matthew 4:19?
answer: Come ye after me, and I will make you fishers of men.

question: What is the first beatitude, per Matthew 5:3?
answer: Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

question: What is the second beatitude, per Matthew 5:4?
answer: Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.

question: What is the third beatitude, per Matthew 5:5?
answer: Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.

question: What is the fourth beatitude, per Matthew 5:6?
answer: Blessed are they that hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.

question: What is the fifth beatitude, per Matthew 5:7?
answer: Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.

question: What is the sixth beatitude, per Matthew 5:8?
answer: Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.

question: What is the seventh beatitude, per Matthew 5:9?
answer: Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called sons of God.

question: What is the eighth beatitude, per Matthew 5:10?
answer: Blessed are they that have been persecuted for righteousness' sake: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

question: What does Jesus call his disciples, per Matthew 5:13?
answer: Ye are the salt of the earth.

question: What does Jesus call his disciples in 5:14?
answer: Ye are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hid.

question: What did Jesus say about the law, per Matthew 5:17?
answer: Think not that I came to destroy the law or the prophets: I came not to destroy, but to fulfil.

question: What did Jesus say about anger, per Matthew 5:22?
answer: Every one who is angry with his brother shall be in danger of the judgment.

question: What did Jesus teach about adultery, per Matthew 5:28?
answer: Every one that looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart.

question: What did Jesus say about turning the cheek, per Matthew 5:39?
answer: Whosoever smiteth thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also.

question: What did Jesus say about loving enemies, per Matthew 5:44?
answer: Love your enemies, and pray for them that persecute you.

question: What did Jesus say about being perfect, per Matthew 5:48?
answer: Ye therefore shall be perfect, as your heavenly Father is perfect.

question: What did Jesus teach about giving, per Matthew 6:3?
answer: When thou doest alms, let not thy left hand know what thy right hand doeth.

question: How did Jesus teach to pray, per Matthew 6:6?
answer: When thou prayest, enter into thine inner chamber, and having shut thy door, pray to thy Father who is in secret.

question: How does the Lord's Prayer begin, per Matthew 6:9?
answer: Our Father who art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name.

question: What is the second petition of the Lord's Prayer, per Matthew 6:10?
answer: Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done, as in heaven, so on earth.

question: What is the daily bread petition, per Matthew 6:11?
answer: Give us this day our daily bread.

question: What does Matthew 6:12 ask?
answer: And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors.

question: What does Matthew 6:13 ask?
answer: And bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one.

question: What does Jesus say about treasures, per Matthew 6:19-20?
answer: Lay not up for yourselves treasures upon the earth, where moth and rust consume; but lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven.

question: What is the lamp of the body, per Matthew 6:22?
answer: The lamp of the body is the eye: if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body shall be full of light.

question: Whom can no man serve, per Matthew 6:24?
answer: No man can serve two masters; ye cannot serve God and mammon.

question: What did Jesus say about anxiety, per Matthew 6:25?
answer: Be not anxious for your life, what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink.

question: What does Jesus say about birds, per Matthew 6:26?
answer: Behold the birds of the heaven, that they sow not, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns; and your heavenly Father feedeth them.

question: What does Jesus say about the lilies, per Matthew 6:28?
answer: Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin.

question: What is the priority Jesus teaches, per Matthew 6:33?
answer: Seek ye first his kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.

question: What did Jesus say about judging, per Matthew 7:1?
answer: Judge not, that ye be not judged.

question: What is the mote and beam teaching, per Matthew 7:3?
answer: Why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but considerest not the beam that is in thine own eye?

question: What did Jesus say about asking, per Matthew 7:7?
answer: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you.

question: What is the Golden Rule, per Matthew 7:12?
answer: All things therefore whatsoever ye would that men should do unto you, even so do ye also unto them.

question: What did Jesus say about the narrow gate, per Matthew 7:13?
answer: Enter ye in by the narrow gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction.

question: How are false prophets known, per Matthew 7:16?
answer: By their fruits ye shall know them. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles?

question: What did the wise man build on, per Matthew 7:24-25?
answer: He built his house upon the rock: and the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell not.

question: What did the foolish man build on, per Matthew 7:26-27?
answer: He built his house upon the sand: and the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and smote upon that house; and it fell.

question: What did the leper ask Jesus, per Matthew 8:2?
answer: Lord, if thou wilt, thou canst make me clean.

question: What did Jesus say of the centurion's faith, per Matthew 8:10?
answer: Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.

question: How did Jesus calm the storm, per Matthew 8:26?
answer: He arose, and rebuked the winds and the sea; and there was a great calm.

question: What did Jesus say of foxes and birds, per Matthew 8:20?
answer: The foxes have holes, and the birds of the heaven have nests; but the Son of man hath not where to lay his head.

question: How did Jesus heal the paralytic, per Matthew 9:6?
answer: That ye may know that the Son of man hath authority on earth to forgive sins. Then saith he to the sick of the palsy, Arise, and take up thy bed, and go unto thy house.

question: Whom did Jesus call from the toll-booth, per Matthew 9:9?
answer: Matthew, sitting at the place of toll: and he saith unto him, Follow me.

question: What did Jesus say of the woman with the issue, per Matthew 9:22?
answer: Daughter, be of good cheer; thy faith hath made thee whole.

question: How many disciples did Jesus send out, per Matthew 10:1?
answer: He called unto him his twelve disciples, and gave them authority over unclean spirits.

question: Who were the twelve apostles, per Matthew 10:2-4?
answer: Simon Peter, Andrew his brother, James and John the sons of Zebedee, Philip, Bartholomew, Thomas, Matthew, James of Alphaeus, Thaddaeus, Simon the Cananaean, and Judas Iscariot.

question: What did Jesus say about confession, per Matthew 10:32?
answer: Every one therefore who shall confess me before men, him will I also confess before my Father who is in heaven.

question: What did Jesus say about hairs of the head, per Matthew 10:30?
answer: The very hairs of your head are all numbered.

question: What did Jesus say about taking up the cross, per Matthew 10:38?
answer: He that doth not take his cross and follow after me, is not worthy of me.

question: What did Jesus say about losing one's life, per Matthew 10:39?
answer: He that findeth his life shall lose it; and he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.

question: What did Jesus say of the cup of cold water, per Matthew 10:42?
answer: Whosoever shall give to drink unto one of these little ones a cup of cold water only, in the name of a disciple, verily I say unto you he shall in no wise lose his reward.

question: What did Jesus say of John the Baptist, per Matthew 11:11?
answer: Among them that are born of women there hath not arisen a greater than John the Baptist.

question: What did Jesus invite the weary to do, per Matthew 11:28?
answer: Come unto me, all ye that labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.

question: What did Jesus say of his yoke, per Matthew 11:30?
answer: My yoke is easy, and my burden is light.

question: What is the unforgivable sin, per Matthew 12:31?
answer: The blasphemy against the Spirit shall not be forgiven.

question: What did Jesus say about idle words, per Matthew 12:36?
answer: Every idle word that men shall speak, they shall give account thereof in the day of judgment.

question: What sign did Jesus give, per Matthew 12:40?
answer: As Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the whale; so shall the Son of man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.

question: What is the parable of the sower, per Matthew 13:3?
answer: Behold, the sower went forth to sow.

question: What is the kingdom like in Matthew 13:31?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a grain of mustard seed.

question: What is the kingdom like in Matthew 13:33?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is like unto leaven, which a woman took, and hid in three measures of meal.

question: What is the treasure hid in the field, per Matthew 13:44?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a treasure hidden in the field; which a man found, and hid; and in his joy he goeth and selleth all that he hath, and buyeth that field.

question: How did John the Baptist die, per Matthew 14:10?
answer: He sent and beheaded John in the prison.

question: How many people did Jesus feed with five loaves and two fish, per Matthew 14:21?
answer: They that did eat were about five thousand men, besides women and children.

question: How did Peter walk on water, per Matthew 14:29?
answer: Come. And Peter went down from the boat, and walked upon the waters to come to Jesus.

question: What did Peter cry when he began to sink, per Matthew 14:30?
answer: Lord, save me.

question: What did Jesus say to Peter when he sank, per Matthew 14:31?
answer: O thou of little faith, wherefore didst thou doubt?

question: What did Peter confess at Caesarea Philippi, per Matthew 16:16?
answer: Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living God.

question: What did Jesus say to Peter, per Matthew 16:18?
answer: Thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of Hades shall not prevail against it.

question: What did Jesus say of the keys of the kingdom, per Matthew 16:19?
answer: I will give unto thee the keys of the kingdom of heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt bind on earth shall be bound in heaven.

question: Whom did Jesus take to the Mount of Transfiguration, per Matthew 17:1?
answer: Peter, and James, and John his brother.

question: How did Jesus appear at the Transfiguration, per Matthew 17:2?
answer: His face did shine as the sun, and his garments became white as the light.

question: Who appeared with Jesus on the mount, per Matthew 17:3?
answer: And behold, there appeared unto them Moses and Elijah talking with him.

question: What did the voice from the cloud say, per Matthew 17:5?
answer: This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased; hear ye him.

question: What did Jesus say of childlike faith, per Matthew 18:3?
answer: Except ye turn, and become as little children, ye shall in no wise enter into the kingdom of heaven.

question: How often should we forgive, per Matthew 18:22?
answer: I say not unto thee, Until seven times; but, Until seventy times seven.

question: What is the parable of the unforgiving servant about, per Matthew 18:24?
answer: There was brought unto him one that owed him ten thousand talents.

question: What did Jesus say about marriage, per Matthew 19:6?
answer: What therefore God hath joined together, let not man put asunder.

question: What did Jesus say about the rich young ruler's question, per Matthew 19:21?
answer: If thou wouldest be perfect, go, sell that which thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me.

question: What did Jesus say about a camel and the eye of a needle, per Matthew 19:24?
answer: It is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.

question: What is the parable of the laborers in the vineyard, per Matthew 20:1?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that was a householder, who went out early in the morning to hire laborers into his vineyard.

question: What did the mother of Zebedee's sons ask, per Matthew 20:21?
answer: Command that these my two sons may sit, one on thy right hand, and one on thy left hand, in thy kingdom.

question: What did Jesus say of greatness, per Matthew 20:26?
answer: Whosoever would become great among you shall be your minister.

question: On what did Jesus enter Jerusalem, per Matthew 21:7?
answer: They brought the ass, and the colt, and put on them their garments; and he sat thereon.

question: What did the people cry as Jesus entered Jerusalem, per Matthew 21:9?
answer: Hosanna to the son of David: Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord; Hosanna in the highest.

question: What did Jesus do in the temple, per Matthew 21:12?
answer: Jesus entered into the temple of God, and cast out all them that sold and bought in the temple.

question: What did Jesus call the temple, per Matthew 21:13?
answer: My house shall be called a house of prayer: but ye make it a den of robbers.

question: What is the great commandment, per Matthew 22:37?
answer: Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind.

question: What is the second commandment like it, per Matthew 22:39?
answer: Thou shalt love thy neighbor as thyself.

question: What did Jesus say of widows' houses, per Matthew 23:14?
answer: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye devour widows' houses.

question: What did Jesus prophesy of the temple, per Matthew 24:2?
answer: There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.

question: What is the parable of the ten virgins, per Matthew 25:1?
answer: Then shall the kingdom of heaven be likened unto ten virgins, who took their lamps, and went forth to meet the bridegroom.

question: What is the parable of the talents, per Matthew 25:14-15?
answer: It is as when a man, going into another country, called his own servants, and delivered unto them his goods. And unto one he gave five talents, to another two, to another one.

question: What did the king say to the righteous, per Matthew 25:34?
answer: Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world.

question: What is the king's commendation in Matthew 25:35-36?
answer: For I was hungry, and ye gave me to eat; I was thirsty, and ye gave me drink; I was a stranger, and ye took me in.

question: What price was Judas paid to betray Jesus, per Matthew 26:15?
answer: They weighed unto him thirty pieces of silver.

question: What did Jesus institute at the Last Supper, per Matthew 26:26?
answer: Take, eat; this is my body.

question: What did Jesus say of the cup, per Matthew 26:28?
answer: This is my blood of the covenant, which is poured out for many unto remission of sins.

question: What did Jesus pray in Gethsemane, per Matthew 26:39?
answer: My Father, if it be possible, let this cup pass away from me: nevertheless, not as I will, but as thou wilt.

question: How did Judas identify Jesus, per Matthew 26:48?
answer: Whomsoever I shall kiss, that is he: take him.

question: What did Peter do when accused of being Jesus' disciple, per Matthew 26:74?
answer: He began to curse and to swear, I know not the man. And straightway the cock crew.

question: What did Pilate's wife send to him, per Matthew 27:19?
answer: Have thou nothing to do with that righteous man; for I have suffered many things this day in a dream because of him.

question: What did Pilate do at the trial, per Matthew 27:24?
answer: He took water, and washed his hands before the multitude, saying, I am innocent of the blood of this righteous man.

question: What hour did darkness cover the land, per Matthew 27:45?
answer: Now from the sixth hour there was darkness over all the land until the ninth hour.

question: What did Jesus cry on the cross, per Matthew 27:46?
answer: Eli, Eli, lama sabachthani? that is, My God, my God, why hast thou forsaken me?

question: What happened to the temple veil, per Matthew 27:51?
answer: The veil of the temple was rent in two from the top to the bottom; and the earth did quake.

question: What did the centurion say at the cross, per Matthew 27:54?
answer: Truly this was the Son of God.

question: What did the angel say at the tomb, per Matthew 28:6?
answer: He is not here; for he is risen, even as he said.

question: What is the Great Commission, per Matthew 28:19?
answer: Go ye therefore, and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them into the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.

question: What promise did Jesus give in Matthew 28:20?
answer: Lo, I am with you always, even unto the end of the world.

question: How does Mark's gospel begin, per Mark 1:1?
answer: The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God.

question: What did the Spirit drive Jesus to do, per Mark 1:12?
answer: Straightway the Spirit driveth him forth into the wilderness.

question: What did Jesus say at the calling of Levi, per Mark 2:17?
answer: They that are whole have no need of a physician, but they that are sick: I came not to call the righteous, but sinners.

question: What was the sabbath made for, per Mark 2:27?
answer: The sabbath was made for man, and not man for the sabbath.

question: How did Jesus heal the man with the unclean spirit at Capernaum, per Mark 1:25?
answer: Hold thy peace, and come out of him.

question: What did Jesus do to Peter's wife's mother, per Mark 1:31?
answer: He came and took her by the hand, and raised her up; and the fever left her.

question: What did the demons cry out in Mark 5:7?
answer: What have I to do with thee, Jesus, thou Son of the Most High God?

question: How many demons did Legion have, per Mark 5:9?
answer: My name is Legion; for we are many.

question: What happened to the herd of swine, per Mark 5:13?
answer: The herd, in number about two thousand, rushed down the steep into the sea, and they were drowned in the sea.

question: What did Jesus say to Jairus, per Mark 5:36?
answer: Fear not, only believe.

question: What did Jesus say to the dead girl, per Mark 5:41?
answer: Talitha cumi; which is, being interpreted, Damsel, I say unto thee, Arise.

question: What did Jesus say of his own country, per Mark 6:4?
answer: A prophet is not without honor, save in his own country, and among his own kin, and in his own house.

question: What were the disciples to take on their journey, per Mark 6:8?
answer: Nothing for their journey, save a staff only; no bread, no wallet, no money in their purse.

question: What was Herod's birthday party that led to John's death, per Mark 6:21?
answer: A convenient day was come, that Herod on his birthday made a supper to his lords.

question: What was Herod's daughter's request, per Mark 6:25?
answer: I will that thou forthwith give me on a platter the head of John the Baptist.

question: What did Jesus do when he saw the multitudes, per Mark 6:34?
answer: He had compassion on them, because they were as sheep not having a shepherd.

question: What did Jesus say defiles a man, per Mark 7:15?
answer: There is nothing from without the man, that going into him can defile him; but the things which proceed out of the man are those that defile the man.

question: What did the Syrophoenician woman say, per Mark 7:28?
answer: Yea, Lord; even the dogs under the table eat of the children's crumbs.

question: What was Jesus' Aramaic word to the deaf man, per Mark 7:34?
answer: Ephphatha, that is, Be opened.

question: What did Jesus say of denying self, per Mark 8:34?
answer: If any man would come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.

question: What did Jesus say of gaining the world, per Mark 8:36?
answer: What doth it profit a man, to gain the whole world, and forfeit his life?

question: What did the father of the demoniac boy cry, per Mark 9:24?
answer: I believe; help thou mine unbelief.

question: What did Jesus say of suffering the children, per Mark 10:14?
answer: Suffer the little children to come unto me; forbid them not: for to such belongeth the kingdom of God.

question: What did Jesus say of the rich entering the kingdom, per Mark 10:25?
answer: It is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.

question: What did blind Bartimaeus cry, per Mark 10:47?
answer: Jesus, thou son of David, have mercy on me.

question: What was Jesus' response to Bartimaeus, per Mark 10:52?
answer: Go thy way; thy faith hath made thee whole.

question: What did Jesus say of the widow's mite, per Mark 12:43?
answer: Verily I say unto you, This poor widow cast in more than all they that are casting into the treasury.

question: What did Jesus say of the great commandment, per Mark 12:30?
answer: Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength.

question: What did Jesus do with the fig tree, per Mark 11:14?
answer: No man eat fruit from thee henceforward for ever. And his disciples heard it.

question: What did Jesus say of forgiveness in prayer, per Mark 11:25?
answer: Whensoever ye stand praying, forgive, if ye have aught against any one.

question: How did Jesus' anguish in Gethsemane appear, per Mark 14:33?
answer: He taketh with him Peter and James and John, and began to be greatly amazed, and sore troubled.

question: What did Jesus pray with Abba, per Mark 14:36?
answer: Abba, Father, all things are possible unto thee; remove this cup from me: howbeit not what I will, but what thou wilt.

question: What did the centurion say at Mark 15:39?
answer: Truly this man was the Son of God.

question: What did the women buy to anoint Jesus, per Mark 16:1?
answer: Spices, that they might come and anoint him.

question: How does Mark's gospel end, per Mark 16:15?
answer: Go ye into all the world, and preach the gospel to the whole creation.

question: How does Luke's gospel begin, per Luke 1:1-3?
answer: Forasmuch as many have taken in hand to draw up a narrative concerning those matters which have been fulfilled among us.

question: Whom did the angel Gabriel visit first, per Luke 1:13?
answer: Zacharias, the priest, telling him his wife Elisabeth would bear a son.

question: What was the son's name to be, per Luke 1:13?
answer: John.

question: What was Zacharias' punishment, per Luke 1:20?
answer: Behold, thou shalt be silent and not able to speak.

question: How was Mary greeted by the angel, per Luke 1:28?
answer: Hail, thou that art highly favored, the Lord is with thee.

question: What did Mary ask the angel, per Luke 1:34?
answer: How shall this be, seeing I know not a man?

question: How did the angel answer, per Luke 1:35?
answer: The Holy Spirit shall come upon thee, and the power of the Most High shall overshadow thee.

question: What did Mary say in response, per Luke 1:38?
answer: Behold, the handmaid of the Lord; be it unto me according to thy word.

question: How does Mary's Magnificat begin, per Luke 1:46?
answer: My soul doth magnify the Lord, And my spirit hath rejoiced in God my Saviour.

question: What did the angels announce to the shepherds, per Luke 2:11?
answer: For there is born to you this day in the city of David a Saviour, who is Christ the Lord.

question: What was the sign for the shepherds, per Luke 2:12?
answer: Ye shall find a babe wrapped in swaddling clothes, and lying in a manger.

question: What did the multitude of angels say, per Luke 2:14?
answer: Glory to God in the highest, And on earth peace among men in whom he is well pleased.

question: Who was Simeon at the temple, per Luke 2:25?
answer: There was a man in Jerusalem, whose name was Simeon; and this man was righteous and devout, looking for the consolation of Israel.

question: What did Simeon say of Jesus, per Luke 2:30-32?
answer: Mine eyes have seen thy salvation, Which thou hast prepared before the face of all peoples; A light for revelation to the Gentiles, And the glory of thy people Israel.

question: Who was Anna the prophetess, per Luke 2:36?
answer: Anna, a prophetess, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Asher.

question: How old was Jesus when he was found in the temple, per Luke 2:42?
answer: When he was twelve years old, they went up after the custom of the feast.

question: What did Jesus say to his parents in the temple, per Luke 2:49?
answer: Knew ye not that I must be in my Father's house?

question: How old was Jesus when he began his ministry, per Luke 3:23?
answer: Jesus himself, when he began to teach, was about thirty years of age.

question: What did Jesus read in Nazareth, per Luke 4:18?
answer: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, Because he anointed me to preach good tidings to the poor.

question: What miracle did Peter witness in Luke 5:6?
answer: They inclosed a great multitude of fishes; and their nets were breaking.

question: What did Peter say after the great catch of fish, per Luke 5:8?
answer: Depart from me; for I am a sinful man, O Lord.

question: What did Jesus say of new wine, per Luke 5:38?
answer: New wine must be put into fresh wine-skins.

question: What did Jesus say of loving enemies, per Luke 6:27?
answer: Love your enemies, do good to them that hate you.

question: What is the Sermon on the Plain blessing, per Luke 6:21?
answer: Blessed are ye that hunger now: for ye shall be filled. Blessed are ye that weep now: for ye shall laugh.

question: What did Jesus say of giving, per Luke 6:38?
answer: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over.

question: What did Jesus do at the city of Nain, per Luke 7:14?
answer: He came nigh and touched the bier; and the bearers stood still. And he said, Young man, I say unto thee, Arise.

question: What did the sinful woman do at Simon's house, per Luke 7:38?
answer: Standing behind at his feet, weeping, she began to wet his feet with her tears, and wiped them with the hair of her head, and kissed his feet.

question: What is the parable of the good Samaritan, per Luke 10:30?
answer: A certain man was going down from Jerusalem to Jericho; and he fell among robbers, who both stripped him and beat him.

question: What did Jesus say to Martha, per Luke 10:41-42?
answer: Martha, Martha, thou art anxious and troubled about many things: but one thing is needful: for Mary hath chosen the good part.

question: What did Jesus teach his disciples to pray, per Luke 11:2?
answer: When ye pray, say, Father, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come.

question: What is the parable of the rich fool, per Luke 12:20?
answer: Thou foolish one, this night is thy soul required of thee.

question: What did Jesus say of treasure and heart, per Luke 12:34?
answer: Where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.

question: What is the parable of the lost sheep, per Luke 15:4?
answer: What man of you, having a hundred sheep, and having lost one of them, doth not leave the ninety and nine in the wilderness, and go after that which is lost?

question: What is the parable of the lost coin, per Luke 15:8?
answer: What woman having ten pieces of silver, if she lose one piece, doth not light a lamp, and sweep the house?

question: What did the prodigal son say, per Luke 15:18?
answer: I will arise and go to my father, and will say unto him, Father, I have sinned against heaven, and in thy sight.

question: What did the father do for the prodigal, per Luke 15:22?
answer: Bring forth quickly the best robe, and put it on him; and put a ring on his hand, and shoes on his feet.

question: What did the father say to the elder son, per Luke 15:31?
answer: Son, thou art ever with me, and all that is mine is thine.

question: Who was Lazarus in the parable, per Luke 16:20?
answer: A certain beggar named Lazarus was laid at his gate, full of sores.

question: What did the rich man see in Hades, per Luke 16:23?
answer: In Hades he lifted up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his bosom.

question: What did Jesus heal at the village of ten lepers, per Luke 17:14?
answer: Go and show yourselves unto the priests. And it came to pass, as they went, they were cleansed.

question: How many of the lepers returned to thank Jesus, per Luke 17:15?
answer: One of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, with a loud voice glorifying God.

question: What did the persistent widow seek, per Luke 18:3?
answer: Avenge me of mine adversary.

question: What did Jesus say of the Pharisee and publican, per Luke 18:14?
answer: This man went down to his house justified rather than the other.

question: What did Zacchaeus do to see Jesus, per Luke 19:4?
answer: He ran on before, and climbed up into a sycomore tree to see him.

question: What did Zacchaeus promise, per Luke 19:8?
answer: Behold, Lord, the half of my goods I give to the poor; and if I have wrongfully exacted aught of any man, I restore fourfold.

question: What did Jesus weep over, per Luke 19:41?
answer: When he drew nigh, he saw the city and wept over it.

question: What did Jesus tell Peter at the Last Supper, per Luke 22:31?
answer: Simon, Simon, behold, Satan asked to have you, that he might sift you as wheat.

question: What did Jesus pray on the cross, per Luke 23:34?
answer: Father, forgive them; for they know not what they do.

question: What did Jesus say to the thief, per Luke 23:43?
answer: Verily I say unto thee, To-day shalt thou be with me in Paradise.

question: What were Jesus' last words on the cross, per Luke 23:46?
answer: Father, into thy hands I commend my spirit.

question: What did the disciples on Emmaus say, per Luke 24:32?
answer: Was not our heart burning within us, while he spake to us in the way?

question: What did Jesus eat after the resurrection, per Luke 24:42-43?
answer: They gave him a piece of a broiled fish; and he took it, and ate before them.

question: How does John's gospel begin, per John 1:1?
answer: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

question: Who was John 1:6 about?
answer: There came a man, sent from God, whose name was John.

question: What is the Word that became flesh, per John 1:14?
answer: The Word became flesh, and dwelt among us, and we beheld his glory, glory as of the only begotten from the Father.

question: What did John the Baptist confess, per John 1:20?
answer: He confessed, and denied not; and he confessed, I am not the Christ.

question: What did John call Jesus, per John 1:29?
answer: Behold, the Lamb of God, that taketh away the sin of the world!

question: What did Andrew tell his brother, per John 1:41?
answer: We have found the Messiah (which is, being interpreted, Christ).

question: What did Nathanael say of Nazareth, per John 1:46?
answer: Can any good thing come out of Nazareth?

question: What was Jesus' first miracle, per John 2:7-9?
answer: Jesus saith unto them, Fill the waterpots with water. And they filled them up to the brim... and the water now become wine.

question: What did Jesus do in the temple, per John 2:15?
answer: He made a scourge of cords, and cast all out of the temple, both the sheep and the oxen.

question: What did Jesus say of his body and the temple, per John 2:19?
answer: Destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.

question: What did Nicodemus come to Jesus by, per John 3:2?
answer: The same came unto him by night.

question: What did Jesus say of being born again, per John 3:3?
answer: Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except one be born anew, he cannot see the kingdom of God.

question: What did Jesus say to the Samaritan woman, per John 4:14?
answer: Whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst.

question: What did Jesus say of true worship, per John 4:24?
answer: God is a Spirit: and they that worship him must worship in spirit and truth.

question: How did Jesus describe his food, per John 4:34?
answer: My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to accomplish his work.

question: What did Jesus say to the lame man at Bethesda, per John 5:8?
answer: Arise, take up thy bed, and walk.

question: What did Jesus say of his works and the Father, per John 5:19?
answer: The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father doing.

question: What did Jesus say is the bread of life, per John 6:35?
answer: I am the bread of life: he that cometh to me shall not hunger, and he that believeth on me shall never thirst.

question: What did Jesus say about giving him in John 6:37?
answer: All that which the Father giveth me shall come unto me; and him that cometh to me I will in no wise cast out.

question: What did Jesus say to the woman caught in adultery, per John 8:7?
answer: He that is without sin among you, let him first cast a stone at her.

question: What did Jesus say of himself in John 8:12?
answer: I am the light of the world: he that followeth me shall not walk in the darkness, but shall have the light of life.

question: What did Jesus say of truth, per John 8:32?
answer: Ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.

question: What did Jesus say of his pre-existence, per John 8:58?
answer: Before Abraham was born, I am.

question: How did Jesus heal the blind man, per John 9:6?
answer: He spat on the ground, and made clay of the spittle, and anointed his eyes with the clay.

question: What did Jesus say of being the door, per John 10:9?
answer: I am the door: by me if any man enter in, he shall be saved.

question: What did Jesus say of being the good shepherd, per John 10:11?
answer: I am the good shepherd: the good shepherd layeth down his life for the sheep.

question: What did Jesus say of his sheep, per John 10:27?
answer: My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me.

question: What did Jesus say of being one with the Father, per John 10:30?
answer: I and the Father are one.

question: What did Jesus say at Lazarus's tomb, per John 11:25?
answer: I am the resurrection, and the life: he that believeth on me, though he die, yet shall he live.

question: What is the shortest verse, per John 11:35?
answer: Jesus wept.

question: What did Jesus say of his life, per John 11:43-44?
answer: He cried with a loud voice, Lazarus, come forth. He that was dead came forth, bound hand and foot with grave-clothes.

question: What did Mary anoint Jesus with, per John 12:3?
answer: A pound of ointment of pure nard, very precious, and anointed the feet of Jesus.

question: What did Jesus do for his disciples in John 13:5?
answer: He poureth water into the basin, and began to wash the disciples' feet, and to wipe them with the towel wherewith he was girded.

question: What is the new commandment, per John 13:34?
answer: A new commandment I give unto you, that ye love one another; even as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.

question: How are disciples known, per John 13:35?
answer: By this shall all men know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another.

question: What did Jesus say of being the way, per John 14:6?
answer: I am the way, and the truth, and the life: no one cometh unto the Father, but by me.

question: What did Jesus promise about the Comforter, per John 14:16?
answer: I will pray the Father, and he shall give you another Comforter, that he may be with you for ever.

question: What did Jesus say of his peace, per John 14:27?
answer: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you.

question: What did Jesus say of the vine, per John 15:5?
answer: I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same beareth much fruit.

question: What did Jesus say of greater love, per John 15:13?
answer: Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.

question: What did Jesus pray of unity, per John 17:21?
answer: That they may all be one; even as thou, Father, art in me, and I in thee.

question: What did Pilate ask Jesus about truth, per John 18:38?
answer: What is truth?

question: What did Jesus cry on the cross, per John 19:30?
answer: It is finished: and he bowed his head, and gave up his spirit.

question: What did Mary Magdalene see at the tomb, per John 20:12?
answer: She beholdeth two angels in white sitting, one at the head, and one at the feet, where the body of Jesus had lain.

question: What did Jesus say to Mary Magdalene, per John 20:17?
answer: Touch me not; for I am not yet ascended unto the Father.

question: What did Thomas say when he saw Jesus, per John 20:28?
answer: My Lord and my God.

question: What did Jesus say to Peter three times, per John 21:17?
answer: Simon, son of John, lovest thou me? ... Feed my sheep.

question: How does John's gospel close, per John 21:25?
answer: There are also many other things which Jesus did, the which if they should be written every one, I suppose that even the world itself would not contain the books that should be written.

question: What did the angels say at the tomb, per Luke 24:5?
answer: Why seek ye the living among the dead?

question: What did Jesus call the Pharisees in Matthew 23:27?
answer: Ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which outwardly appear beautiful, but inwardly are full of dead men's bones.

question: What did Jesus say of the Sabbath, per Mark 2:28?
answer: So that the Son of man is lord even of the sabbath.

question: What was Jesus' prayer at Lazarus' tomb, per John 11:41?
answer: Father, I thank thee that thou heardest me.

question: What did Jesus say of being a servant, per Mark 10:45?
answer: For the Son of man also came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.

question: What did Jesus say of the parable of the seed and growth, per Mark 4:28?
answer: The earth beareth fruit of herself; first the blade, then the ear, then the full grain in the ear.

question: What did Jesus tell Nicodemus of the Spirit, per John 3:8?
answer: The wind bloweth where it will, and thou hearest the voice thereof, but knowest not whence it cometh, and whither it goeth.

question: What did Jesus say of his Father's house, per John 14:2?
answer: In my Father's house are many mansions; if it were not so, I would have told you.

question: What did Jesus say of obedience and love, per John 14:15?
answer: If ye love me, ye will keep my commandments.

question: What did Jesus say of asking in his name, per John 14:13?
answer: Whatsoever ye shall ask in my name, that will I do.

question: What did Jesus say of fruit-bearing branches, per John 15:2?
answer: Every branch in me that beareth not fruit, he taketh it away: and every branch that beareth fruit, he cleanseth it.

question: What did Jesus say of the world hating disciples, per John 15:18?
answer: If the world hateth you, ye know that it hath hated me before it hated you.

question: What did Jesus say of the Spirit of truth, per John 16:13?
answer: When he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he shall guide you into all the truth.

question: What did Jesus pray about the world's hatred, per John 17:14?
answer: I have given them thy word; and the world hated them.

question: What did Jesus say of his kingdom, per John 18:36?
answer: My kingdom is not of this world.

question: What did Pilate write on the cross, per John 19:19?
answer: JESUS OF NAZARETH, THE KING OF THE JEWS.

question: In what languages was the title written, per John 19:20?
answer: It was written in Hebrew, and in Latin, and in Greek.

question: What did the soldiers do with Jesus' garment, per John 19:23-24?
answer: They took his garments, and made four parts, to every soldier a part; and also the coat: now the coat was without seam, woven from the top throughout.

question: What flowed from Jesus' side, per John 19:34?
answer: One of the soldiers with a spear pierced his side, and straightway there came out blood and water.

question: What did Jesus appear to do for the disciples in the locked room, per John 20:19?
answer: He came and stood in the midst, and saith unto them, Peace be unto you.

question: What did Jesus breathe on the disciples for, per John 20:22?
answer: Receive ye the Holy Spirit.

question: How did Peter answer Jesus' question, per John 21:15?
answer: Yea, Lord; thou knowest that I love thee.

question: What was Peter's reply when Jesus asked the third time, per John 21:17?
answer: Lord, thou knowest all things; thou knowest that I love thee.

question: What did Jesus say of the lilies' beauty, per Matthew 6:29?
answer: Even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.

question: What did Jesus say of fasting, per Matthew 6:17?
answer: When thou fastest, anoint thy head, and wash thy face.

question: What did Jesus say of swearing oaths, per Matthew 5:34?
answer: Swear not at all; neither by the heaven, for it is the throne of God.

question: What did Jesus say of yes and no, per Matthew 5:37?
answer: Let your speech be, Yea, yea; Nay, nay: and whatsoever is more than these is of the evil one.

question: What did Jesus say of mountain-moving faith, per Matthew 17:20?
answer: If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove.

question: What did Jesus say of children's angels, per Matthew 18:10?
answer: Their angels in heaven do always behold the face of my Father who is in heaven.

question: What did Jesus say of two or three gathered, per Matthew 18:20?
answer: Where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them.

question: What did Jesus say to the rich young ruler about goodness, per Mark 10:18?
answer: Why callest thou me good? none is good save one, even God.

question: What did Jesus call John and James, per Mark 3:17?
answer: Boanerges, which is, Sons of thunder.

question: What did the demons confess about Jesus, per Mark 1:24?
answer: I know thee who thou art, the Holy One of God.

question: What did Jesus do at Bethsaida for the blind man, per Mark 8:23?
answer: He took hold of the blind man by the hand, and brought him out of the village; and when he had spit on his eyes, and laid his hands upon him.

question: How did the blind man see at first, per Mark 8:24?
answer: I see men; for I behold them as trees, walking.

question: What did Jesus tell the Samaritan woman about her husbands, per John 4:18?
answer: Thou hast had five husbands; and he whom thou now hast is not thy husband.

question: What did the Samaritans say after meeting Jesus, per John 4:42?
answer: Now we believe, not because of thy speaking: for we have heard for ourselves, and know that this is indeed the Saviour of the world.

question: What was the meal Jesus prepared at the lakeside after resurrection, per John 21:9?
answer: As soon then as they got out upon the land, they see a fire of coals there, and fish laid thereon, and bread.

question: How many fish were caught at the lake after Jesus' resurrection, per John 21:11?
answer: A hundred and fifty and three: and for all there were so many, the net was not rent.

question: What did Jesus tell his disciples about being witnesses, per Luke 24:48?
answer: Ye are witnesses of these things.

question: What did Jesus say of the Holy Spirit's coming, per Luke 24:49?
answer: Behold, I send forth the promise of my Father upon you: but tarry ye in the city, until ye be clothed with power from on high.

question: How was Jesus taken up to heaven, per Luke 24:51?
answer: As he blessed them, he parted from them, and was carried up into heaven.

question: What did Jesus' brothers say of him, per John 7:5?
answer: For even his brethren did not believe on him.

question: What was Jesus questioned about regarding paying tribute, per Mark 12:14?
answer: Is it lawful to give tribute unto Caesar, or not? Shall we give, or shall we not give?

question: What did Jesus answer about the coin, per Mark 12:17?
answer: Render unto Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and unto God the things that are God's.

question: What did Jesus say of the time of his return, per Mark 13:32?
answer: But of that day or that hour knoweth no one, not even the angels in heaven, neither the Son, but the Father.

question: What is the parable of the seed growing secretly, per Mark 4:26-27?
answer: So is the kingdom of God, as if a man should cast seed upon the earth; and should sleep and rise night and day, and the seed should spring up and grow.

question: What is the parable of the wheat and tares, per Matthew 13:24-25?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is likened unto a man that sowed good seed in his field: but while men slept, his enemy came and sowed tares also among the wheat.

question: What is the parable of the dragnet, per Matthew 13:47?
answer: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a net, that was cast into the sea, and gathered of every kind.

question: What is the parable of the unmerciful servant about, per Matthew 18:32-33?
answer: Thou wicked servant, I forgave thee all that debt, because thou besoughtest me: shouldest not thou also have had mercy on thy fellow-servant?

question: What did Jesus say of children and the kingdom, per Matthew 18:14?
answer: It is not the will of your Father who is in heaven, that one of these little ones should perish.

question: What did Jesus' soul desire on the cross, per Matthew 27:34?
answer: They gave him wine to drink mingled with gall: and when he had tasted it, he would not drink.

question: What did the soldiers gamble for at the cross, per Matthew 27:35?
answer: They crucified him, and parted his garments among them, casting lots.

question: How did Jesus die, per John 19:30?
answer: He bowed his head, and gave up his spirit.

question: What did the Roman soldier do to Jesus' legs, per John 19:33?
answer: They came to Jesus, and saw that he was dead already, they brake not his legs.

question: How long after the crucifixion did Jesus rise, per Mark 16:9?
answer: He rose early on the first day of the week.

question: To whom did Jesus first appear after the resurrection, per Mark 16:9?

question: What is the works of the flesh, per Galatians 5:19-21?

question: What does Galatians 6:9 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 1:7 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 2:14 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 3:20 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 4:1-3 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 4:26 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 5:18 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 6:1 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 6:11 declare?

question: What does Philippians 1:6 declare?

question: What does Philippians 2:3 declare?

question: What does Philippians 2:13 declare?

question: What does Philippians 3:13-14 declare?

question: What does Philippians 4:19 declare?

question: What does Colossians 1:17 declare?

question: What does Colossians 2:9 declare?

question: What does Colossians 3:13 declare?

question: What does Colossians 4:6 declare?

question: What does 1 Thessalonians 4:11 declare?

question: What does 1 Thessalonians 5:21 declare?

question: What does 2 Thessalonians 2:3 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 1:15 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 2:5 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 3:16 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 6:6 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 6:11 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 1:7 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 2:15 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 3:1-5 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 4:2 declare?

question: What does Titus 2:11-12 declare?

question: What did Paul confess in Romans 7:24?

question: What is the Spirit's intercession, per Romans 8:26?

question: What does Romans 9:21 say of the potter?

question: What does Romans 13:7 declare?

question: What does Romans 14:8 declare?

question: What does Romans 16:20 declare?

question: What does 2 Corinthians 8:9 declare?

question: What does Galatians 4:4 declare?

question: What does Galatians 6:14 declare?
answer: Far be it from me to glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ.

question: What does Ephesians 1:13 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 2:19 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 3:14-15 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 4:11 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 5:1-2 declare?

question: What does Ephesians 6:18 declare?

question: What does Philippians 1:9-10 declare?

question: What does Philippians 2:14 declare?

question: What does Philippians 3:8 declare?
answer: I count all things to be loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord.

question: What does Philippians 3:20 declare?

question: What does Colossians 2:6-7 declare?

question: What does Colossians 3:16 declare?

question: What does Colossians 3:17 declare?

question: What does 1 Thessalonians 5:11 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 2:1-2 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 3:1 declare?

question: What does 1 Timothy 5:8 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 1:12 declare?

question: What does 2 Timothy 4:8 declare?

question: What does Titus 2:13 declare?

question: How does Hebrews begin, per Hebrews 1:1?

question: How did God speak in these last days, per Hebrews 1:2?

question: What does Hebrews 4:12 declare of the word?

question: What does Hebrews 4:15 declare of Christ?

question: What is faith defined as in Hebrews 11:1?

question: What does Hebrews 11:6 declare?

question: How does Revelation begin, per Revelation 1:1?

question: Who wrote the Revelation, per Revelation 1:9?

question: On what island was John when he received the vision, per Revelation 1:9?

question: How was Christ's appearance, per Revelation 1:14-15?

question: What did John see in Revelation 4:2?

question: What surrounded the throne, per Revelation 4:3?

question: How many elders sat around the throne, per Revelation 4:4?

question: What did the four living creatures cry, per Revelation 4:8?

question: What did John see in the Father's right hand, per Revelation 5:1?

question: What did the multitude in heaven say, per Revelation 5:13?

question: What were the four horsemen, per Revelation 6:2-8?

question: What was the great multitude in white robes, per Revelation 7:9?

question: What did Revelation 7:17 declare?

question: What was the silence in heaven, per Revelation 8:1?

question: How many angels sounded trumpets, per Revelation 8:2?

question: What was the wormwood star, per Revelation 8:11?

question: How long did the locust torment last, per Revelation 9:5?

question: What was the strong angel's book, per Revelation 10:9?

question: How long did the two witnesses prophesy, per Revelation 11:3?

question: What was the great red dragon, per Revelation 12:3?

question: What happened to the dragon, per Revelation 12:9?

question: How did they overcome him, per Revelation 12:11?

question: What was the mark of the beast, per Revelation 13:17-18?

question: What is Babylon called, per Revelation 17:5?

question: What did Revelation 19:6 declare?

question: What is the marriage of the Lamb, per Revelation 19:7?

question: What was the rider's name on the white horse, per Revelation 19:11?

question: What was the rider's other name, per Revelation 19:13?

question: How long was Satan bound, per Revelation 20:2?

question: What was the great white throne, per Revelation 20:11?

question: What was the lake of fire, per Revelation 20:14?

question: What did John see in Revelation 21:1?

question: What was the New Jerusalem, per Revelation 21:2?

question: What did the great voice say, per Revelation 21:3?

question: What did Revelation 21:4 declare?

question: What did the One on the throne say, per Revelation 21:5?
answer: Behold, I make all things new.

question: What is the description of New Jerusalem, per Revelation 21:11?
answer: Having the glory of God: her light was like unto a stone most precious, as it were a jasper stone, clear as crystal.

question: How many gates did the city have, per Revelation 21:12?
answer: Having a wall great and high; having twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels.

question: What was the river in the city, per Revelation 22:1?
answer: He showed me a river of water of life, bright as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb.

question: What was the tree of life, per Revelation 22:2?
answer: On this side of the river and on that was the tree of life, bearing twelve manner of fruits, yielding its fruit every month.

question: What did the Lord say in Revelation 22:13?
answer: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.

question: What is Revelation 22:17?
answer: The Spirit and the bride say, Come. And he that heareth, let him say, Come. And he that is athirst, let him come: he that will, let him take the water of life freely.

question: What does Revelation 22:20 declare?
answer: He who testifieth these things saith, Yea: I come quickly. Amen: come, Lord Jesus.

question: What is Hebrews 5:12 about?
answer: For when by reason of the time ye ought to be teachers, ye have need again that some one teach you the rudiments of the first principles of the oracles of God.

question: What does Hebrews 6:18 declare?
answer: That by two immutable things, in which it is impossible for God to lie, we may have a strong encouragement.

question: What does Hebrews 7:25 declare?
answer: He is able to save to the uttermost them that draw near unto God through him, seeing he ever liveth to make intercession for them.

question: What does Hebrews 9:22 declare?
answer: Apart from shedding of blood there is no remission.

question: What does Hebrews 9:27 declare?
answer: It is appointed unto men once to die, and after this cometh judgment.

question: What does Hebrews 10:24-25 declare?
answer: Let us consider one another to provoke unto love and good works; not forsaking our own assembling together.

question: What does Hebrews 10:31 declare?
answer: It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living God.

question: What does Hebrews 11:13 declare?
answer: These all died in faith, not having received the promises, but having seen them and greeted them from afar, and having confessed that they were strangers and pilgrims on the earth.

question: What does Hebrews 12:14 declare?
answer: Follow after peace with all men, and the sanctification without which no man shall see the Lord.

question: What does Hebrews 13:17 declare?
answer: Obey them that have the rule over you, and submit to them: for they watch in behalf of your souls.

question: What does James 2:10 declare?
answer: Whosoever shall keep the whole law, and yet stumble in one point, he is become guilty of all.

question: What does James 2:13 declare?
answer: Mercy glorieth against judgment.

question: What does James 2:19 declare?
answer: Thou believest that God is one; thou doest well: the demons also believe, and shudder.

question: What does James 4:17 declare?
answer: To him therefore that knoweth to do good, and doeth it not, to him it is sin.

question: What does James 5:7 declare?
answer: Be patient therefore, brethren, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth, being patient over it.

question: What does 1 Peter 1:23 declare?
answer: Having been begotten again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, through the word of God, which liveth and abideth.

question: What does 1 Peter 2:21 declare?
answer: Hereunto were ye called: because Christ also suffered for you, leaving you an example, that ye should follow his steps.

question: What does 1 Peter 3:8-9 declare?
answer: Finally, be ye all likeminded, compassionate, loving as brethren, tenderhearted, humbleminded: not rendering evil for evil, or reviling for reviling.

question: What does 1 Peter 4:10 declare?
answer: According as each hath received a gift, ministering it among yourselves, as good stewards of the manifold grace of God.

question: What does 2 Peter 1:3 declare?
answer: His divine power hath granted unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness.

question: What does 2 Peter 1:5-7 declare?
answer: Adding on your part all diligence, in your faith supply virtue; and in your virtue knowledge; and in your knowledge self-control.

question: What does 2 Peter 3:18 declare?
answer: Grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.

question: What does 1 John 2:6 declare?
answer: He that saith he abideth in him ought himself also to walk even as he walked.

question: What does 1 John 2:17 declare?
answer: The world passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of God abideth for ever.

question: What does 1 John 3:2 declare?
answer: Beloved, now are we children of God, and it is not yet made manifest what we shall be. We know that, if he shall be manifested, we shall be like him.

question: What does 1 John 3:20 declare?
answer: If our heart condemn us, God is greater than our heart, and knoweth all things.

question: What does 1 John 5:3 declare?
answer: This is the love of God, that we keep his commandments: and his commandments are not grievous.

question: What does Revelation 2:11 declare?
answer: He that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.

question: What does Revelation 14:13 declare?
answer: Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from henceforth: yea, saith the Spirit, that they may rest from their labors.

question: What does Revelation 19:9 declare?
answer: Blessed are they that are bidden to the marriage supper of the Lamb.

question: What does Revelation 21:6 declare?
answer: It is done. I am the Alpha and the Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.

question: What does Revelation 21:7 declare?
answer: He that overcometh shall inherit these things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.

question: What does Revelation 21:23 declare?
answer: The city hath no need of the sun, neither of the moon, to shine upon it: for the glory of God did lighten it, and the lamp thereof is the Lamb.

question: What does Revelation 22:14 declare?
answer: Blessed are they that wash their robes, that they may have the right to come to the tree of life.

question: What does Revelation 22:21 declare?
answer: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with the saints. Amen.

question: What does Hebrews 1:14 declare of angels?
answer: Are they not all ministering spirits, sent forth to do service for the sake of them that shall inherit salvation?

question: What does Hebrews 2:3 declare?
answer: How shall we escape, if we neglect so great a salvation?

question: What does Hebrews 3:13 declare?
answer: Exhort one another day by day, so long as it is called To-day; lest any one of you be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.

question: What does Hebrews 5:8-9 declare?
answer: Though he was a Son, yet learned obedience by the things which he suffered; and having been made perfect, he became unto all them that obey him the author of eternal salvation.

question: What does Hebrews 6:10 declare?
answer: For God is not unrighteous to forget your work and the love which ye showed toward his name.

question: What does Hebrews 8:10 declare?
answer: I will put my laws into their mind, and on their heart also will I write them: and I will be to them a God, and they shall be to me a people.

question: What does Hebrews 10:23 declare?
